name: MagneticHover
description: Makes child elements subtly follow the cursor within bounds, creating a magnetic pull effect on hover.

children.description: Content to apply the magnetic effect to

slots.name: children
slots.description: The element that will magnetically follow the cursor on hover

layout.description: Wraps children in an inline-block animated div. The element moves within its bounding box without affecting document flow.

aiPromptHint: Use MagneticHover to make buttons, icons, or cards subtly follow the cursor. Great for CTAs and interactive elements. Set strength (0-1) to control pull intensity.

examples.title: Basic magnetic button
examples.code:
<MagneticHover>
  <button className="rounded-lg bg-white px-6 py-3 text-black font-semibold">
    Get Started
  </button>
</MagneticHover>

examples.title: Strong pull on an icon
Subtle nav link
examples.code: Documentation

examples.title: Disabled state
examples.code:
<MagneticHover disabled>
  <button className="rounded-lg bg-neutral-700 px-6 py-3 text-neutral-400 cursor-not-allowed">
    Unavailable
  </button>
</MagneticHover>
